overview: Jodex Production is a premium portfolio website for a creative studio specializing in 3D Animation, 2D Animation, Video Editing, and Interior Designing. Features a dark glassmorphism aesthetic with animated 3D hero panels, certificate showcase, YouTube client work gallery, and a password-protected admin dashboard for managing all media content.
features: Moving 3D hero panel animation with 6 upload slots for portfolio clips/images
Admin direct file upload for hero panels (no URL input)
Certificate section after hero with direct image upload from admin
YouTube client work section with 3D hover cards
Dark glassmorphism design with neon cyan accents
Hire Me modal with Gmail, Instagram, Discord contacts
